rounds.revealFact: Frida Kahlo is known for vivid self-portraits exploring identity, pain, and Mexican culture.

clues: A decisive naval battle in the Pacific theater of World War II.

pairs.b: Amelia Earhart disappears over the Pacific

rounds.prompt: Christopher Columbus makes landfall in the Caribbean.
rounds.revealFact: Columbus believed he had reached Asia; he never realized he had encountered a continent unknown to Europeans.

image.alt: Extreme close-up of weathered grey stone steps and carved geometric pattern

rounds.revealFact: This Maya step pyramid, El Castillo, was built by the Maya civilization on the Yucatán Peninsula.
